name: agbook
description: AI-powered local novel-writing workstation (本地小说创作 AI 工作台)

scripts.server:bundle: npm -w @agbook/server run build && npm -w @agbook/server run bundle
scripts.server:binary: npm run server:bundle && npm run server:pkg
scripts.desktop:build: npm run server:binary && npm -w @agbook/desktop run build
scripts.build: npm -w @agbook/server run build && npm -w @agbook/web run build
